title: Provider Integration Matrix
purpose: Generate provider integration reader docs from executable provider validation and observation manifests.
gate_policy: AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1 must be set, otherwise the test skips.
The provider executable must be discoverable or explicitly configured with RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH, otherwise the test skips.
The adapter Detect result must be available, otherwise the test skips with the detect reason.
After all gates pass, a failed prompt roundtrip is a real integration failure.
change_procedure: Update the provider test and this matrix in the same PR when real CLI behavior changes.
New providers must add deterministic public tests before optional real-CLI integration.
New providers must define instruction placement and an effectiveness probe marker.
A detected provider with a failed roundtrip is a failure, not a skip.

source_checks.name: provider-validation-manifest
source_checks.contains: SaaS completed thread evidence is not filesystem side-effect evidence

assertions: Public pull-request CI proves deterministic adapter behavior only; real provider CLI execution remains opt-in.
`PASS` means the provider produced the evidence named in provider-validation-matrix.riido.json.
A skipped integration test, detected binary, or SaaS completed thread alone is not filesystem side-effect evidence.
SaaS completion alone must not be treated as filesystem side-effect evidence.
OpenClaw supports text completion but remains supports_worktree=false for worktree-required routing.
Provider full-access/trusted modes must be explicit daemon-owned launch envelopes.
